framework.name: HIPAA
framework.description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act - Security Rule

controls.title: Security Management Process
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to prevent, detect, contain, and correct security violations involving ePHI in AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct risk analysis for AI systems processing ePHI; implement risk management strategy; establish sanction policy for violations; review information system activity regularly

controls.title: Workforce Security
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to ensure workforce members have appropriate access to ePHI and prevent unauthorized access
controls.implementationGuidance: Authorize and supervise AI system access; implement workforce clearance procedures; establish termination procedures for AI system access; train workforce on HIPAA compliance

controls.title: Information Access Management
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures for authorizing access to ePHI consistent with applicable HIPAA requirements
controls.implementationGuidance: Isolate healthcare clearinghouse functions if applicable; establish access authorization procedures for AI systems; implement access establishment and modification procedures

controls.title: Security Awareness and Training
controls.description: Implement security awareness and training program for all workforce members with access to AI systems processing ePHI
controls.implementationGuidance: Train on security reminders; provide protection from malicious software education; conduct log-in monitoring training; implement password management training

controls.title: Security Incident Procedures
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to address security incidents involving AI systems and ePHI
controls.implementationGuidance: Identify and respond to suspected or known security incidents; mitigate harmful effects; document incidents and their outcomes; establish incident response team
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Evaluation
controls.description: Perform periodic technical and non-technical evaluation of AI systems to ensure security measures match requirements
controls.implementationGuidance: Conduct regular security assessments of AI systems; evaluate technical safeguards; review administrative procedures; document evaluation results; update measures based on findings

controls.title: Facility Access Controls
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to limit physical access to AI systems and facilities housing ePHI while ensuring appropriate access
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish contingency operations; implement facility security plans; control physical access procedures; validate person access to AI infrastructure

controls.title: Device and Media Controls
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures for receipt, removal, disposal, and re-use of devices and media containing ePHI used in AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Maintain device and media disposal procedures; implement media re-use protocols; establish accountability for hardware and electronic media; create data backup and storage procedures

controls.title: Access Control
controls.description: Implement technical policies and procedures that allow only authorized persons to access ePHI processed by AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Assign unique user identification; implement emergency access procedures; enable automatic logoff; encrypt and decrypt ePHI; use role-based access control

controls.title: Audit Controls
controls.description: Implement hardware, software, and procedural mechanisms to record and examine activity in AI systems containing ePHI
controls.implementationGuidance: Log all access to AI systems and ePHI; monitor system activity; review audit logs regularly; maintain audit trail integrity; retain logs per policy

controls.title: Integrity Controls
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to ensure ePHI processed by AI systems is not improperly altered or destroyed
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement mechanisms to authenticate ePHI; use checksums or digital signatures; validate data integrity in AI training and inference; detect unauthorized changes
aiRiskDomains: AI System Safety, Failures, and Limitations

controls.title: Person or Entity Authentication
controls.description: Implement procedures to verify that persons or entities seeking access to ePHI in AI systems are who they claim to be
controls.implementationGuidance: Use multi-factor authentication; implement strong authentication mechanisms; verify user identity before AI system access; periodically re-authenticate users

controls.title: Transmission Security
controls.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic networks by AI systems
controls.implementationGuidance: Encrypt ePHI in transit; implement integrity controls for transmissions; use secure protocols (TLS/SSL); protect against interception; verify transmission endpoints
